name: Amy Rose - Anti-Valentine's Day
description:
“I'm refined and delicate like a flower, you jerk!”

When life throws thorns, look for roses.

After being snubbed yet again by Sonic, Amy Rose has given in to the frustration of being single on Valentine's Day and organized a party for those similarly affected by the lack of romance in their lives. Why be alone, when you can be alone together with friends?


You've got an invitation. Just be wary of playing with a girl's heart.

Art sourced from 3bat Hadi3

Edits by M'aiq
creator: M'aiq
